goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: The Turbopack failure is specific to the mirror's external node_modules junction; webpack exposed five real pure-global CSS Module selectors in concurrent planner redesign work. A hash-guarded two-file repair is safe: localize the heading selectors and combine the new local class with the existing global class without changing declarations or behavior.

worker_package.objective: Perform the exact two-file planner heading purity repair, refresh only those files into the isolated mirror, then complete webpack build, planner and Pantry browser/accessibility/screenshots, disposable DB checks, port release, and diff evidence.
verify: Exact five-selector and one className repair
stop_if: Live or shared state would be used.

evidence: Webpack reports the first impure selector and the stylesheet contains five pure-global heading selectors.
The planner page retains the global planner-heading class and can safely add an exported local class.
Source and mirror hashes match for both files; Nutrition scope excludes planner files.

parallel_safety.rationale: One repair then one mirror/port/database verification sequence.

required_board_updates: Keep T999 queued until all gates pass.
